Record Class FishingSkillConfig

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.skill.FishingSkillConfig
Record Components:
xpPerCatch - base XP awarded per Sylphian fish caught
patientAnglerCooldownSeconds - cooldown for Patient Angler
patientAnglerMinTicks - minimum hook wait after Patient Angler activates
patientAnglerMaxTicks - maximum hook wait after Patient Angler activates
lineMasteryReductionPercent - permanent bite timer reduction from Line Mastery
doubleHaulCooldownSeconds - cooldown for Double Haul
steadyCurrentStackReductionPercent - timer reduction added per Steady Current stack
steadyCurrentMaxStacks - maximum Steady Current stacks
steadyCurrentRangeBlocks - catch distance to maintain a Steady Current streak
fishersFrenzyCooldownSeconds - cooldown for Fisher's Frenzy
fishersFrenzyDurationSeconds - duration of the Fisher's Frenzy buff
fishersFrenzyReductionPercent - bite timer reduction while Fisher's Frenzy is active
masterAnglerReductionPercent - additional permanent timer reduction from Master Angler
masterAnglerXpMultiplier - XP multiplier applied by Master Angler
public record FishingSkillConfig(long xpPerCatch, int patientAnglerCooldownSeconds, int patientAnglerMinTicks, int patientAnglerMaxTicks, double lineMasteryReductionPercent, int doubleHaulCooldownSeconds, double steadyCurrentStackReductionPercent, int steadyCurrentMaxStacks, double steadyCurrentRangeBlocks, int fishersFrenzyCooldownSeconds, int fishersFrenzyDurationSeconds, double fishersFrenzyReductionPercent, double masterAnglerReductionPercent, double masterAnglerXpMultiplier) extends Record
Immutable snapshot of all fishing-skill configuration values.

Parse via from(FileConfiguration). Swap the reference on reload; the listener reads through the volatile field in FishingSkill.

  • Constructor Details

    • FishingSkillConfig

      public FishingSkillConfig(long xpPerCatch, int patientAnglerCooldownSeconds, int patientAnglerMinTicks, int patientAnglerMaxTicks, double lineMasteryReductionPercent, int doubleHaulCooldownSeconds, double steadyCurrentStackReductionPercent, int steadyCurrentMaxStacks, double steadyCurrentRangeBlocks, int fishersFrenzyCooldownSeconds, int fishersFrenzyDurationSeconds, double fishersFrenzyReductionPercent, double masterAnglerReductionPercent, double masterAnglerXpMultiplier)
      Creates an instance of a FishingSkillConfig record class.
      Parameters:
      xpPerCatch - the value for the xpPerCatch record component
      patientAnglerCooldownSeconds - the value for the patientAnglerCooldownSeconds record component
      patientAnglerMinTicks - the value for the patientAnglerMinTicks record component
      patientAnglerMaxTicks - the value for the patientAnglerMaxTicks record component
      lineMasteryReductionPercent - the value for the lineMasteryReductionPercent record component
      doubleHaulCooldownSeconds - the value for the doubleHaulCooldownSeconds record component
      steadyCurrentStackReductionPercent - the value for the steadyCurrentStackReductionPercent record component
      steadyCurrentMaxStacks - the value for the steadyCurrentMaxStacks record component
      steadyCurrentRangeBlocks - the value for the steadyCurrentRangeBlocks record component
      fishersFrenzyCooldownSeconds - the value for the fishersFrenzyCooldownSeconds record component
      fishersFrenzyDurationSeconds - the value for the fishersFrenzyDurationSeconds record component
      fishersFrenzyReductionPercent - the value for the fishersFrenzyReductionPercent record component
      masterAnglerReductionPercent - the value for the masterAnglerReductionPercent record component
      masterAnglerXpMultiplier - the value for the masterAnglerXpMultiplier record component

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static FishingSkillConfig from(org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config)
      Parses a FishingSkillConfig from the fishing plugin's config.yml. All keys have safe defaults so a missing section never aborts startup.
      Parameters:
      config - the loaded file configuration
      Returns:
      the parsed snapshot

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
